ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* The measured value from the sensor */,
  "is_anomaly" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the record is classified as an anomaly (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "error_prediction" REAL /* Prediction of the error related to the data point */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Description of the data quality (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding data entry from the sensor_data table */,
  "convergence_loss" REAL /* The loss value during the convergence of the algorithm */,
  "sigmoid_error_prediction" REAL /* Error prediction using the sigmoid function */,
  "anomaly_score" REAL /* Score assigned to the anomaly prediction */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used for prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_metrics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_metrics" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding data entry from the sensor_data table */,
  "low_FP_rate" REAL /* Score for low false positive rate */,
  "low_FN_rate" REAL /* Score for low false negative rate */,
  "standard" INTEGER /* Standard score for comparison */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_metrics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., data science, engineering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding data entry from the sensor_data table */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Description of the alert message */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding data entry from the sensor_data table */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_message" TEXT /* Description of the report message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding data entry from the sensor_data table */,
  "visualization_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)
